changelog: Admin NAT checker now detects real egress interface (ens3, eth0, etc.)
Admin Repair NAT button: auto-fixes ip_forward, MASQUERADE, saves rules
Admin devices table: RX/TX bytes, DNS status, active SNI columns
Admin Iran page: per-device failure tracker, transport success rates
App update banner + force-update blocking modal
Quota display fix: used never shows > total
Staged rollout: Iran-first support via version.json
